title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 August 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 August 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 August 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 02/08/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained quiet overall this week, with limited activity and sentiment still soft. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-08-02_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-26-July-01-August-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
26 July - 01 August 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained quiet overall this week, with limited activity and sentiment still soft. Local pricing in most
destinations held at last week's levels, but the broader picture continues to show a lack of momentum, with buyers across the region maintaining a cautious
approach.
